reasoning: The control IR-4 (2) focuses on dynamic reconfiguration in response to incidents, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that the cluster can dynamically adjust configurations in response to security incidents. This involves enabling dynamic reconfiguration capabilities through admission controllers, ensuring audit logs capture incident response activities, updating network policies dynamically upon threat detection, and revoking access dynamically through RBAC adjustments.
title: Incident Handling | Dynamic Reconfiguration
